page_metadata.biotools__summary: The software program TreeSAAP measures the selective influences on 31 structural and biochemical amino acid properties during clade-genesis, and performs goodness-of-fit and categorical statistical tests.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The software program TreeSAAP measures the selective influences on 31 structural and biochemical amino acid properties during clade-genesis, and performs goodness-of-fit and categorical statistical tests.
